/usr/bin/ar qc libnvdialog.a CMakeFiles/nvdialog.dir/src/backend/gtk/nvdialog_about_dialog.c.o CMakeFiles/nvdialog.dir/src/backend/gtk/nvdialog_file_dialog.c.o CMakeFiles/nvdialog.dir/src/backend/gtk/nvdialog_dialog_box.c.o CMakeFiles/nvdialog.dir/src/backend/gtk/nvdialog_question_dialog.c.o CMakeFiles/nvdialog.dir/src/backend/gtk/nvdialog_notification.c.o CMakeFiles/nvdialog.dir/src/backend/gtk/nvdialog_input_dialog.c.o CMakeFiles/nvdialog.dir/src/nvdialog_error.c.o CMakeFiles/nvdialog.dir/src/nvdialog_image.c.o CMakeFiles/nvdialog.dir/src/nvdialog_util.c.o CMakeFiles/nvdialog.dir/src/nvdialog_capab.c.o CMakeFiles/nvdialog.dir/src/nvdialog_version.c.o CMakeFiles/nvdialog.dir/src/nvdialog_init.c.o CMakeFiles/nvdialog.dir/src/nvdialog_string.c.o CMakeFiles/nvdialog.dir/src/nvdialog_main.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libnvdialog.a
